Class AsyncApi23ComponentsImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.asyncapi.v2x.v23.AsyncApi23ComponentsImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncApiComponents, AsyncApiExtensible, AsyncApi2xComponents, AsyncApi2xExtensible, AsyncApi23Components, AsyncApi23Extensible, Components, Extensible, Node, Visitable
public class AsyncApi23ComponentsImpl extends NodeImpl implements AsyncApi23Components
